p.c: exists(k0: Real) { real_norm(k0) = 0 and k0 != 0 }
let w0: Real satisfy { real_norm(w0) = 0 and w0 != 0 }
real_norm(w0) = 0
function(x0: Real) { x0.abs != 0 or 0 = x0 }(w0)
exists(k0: Real) { real_norm(-k0) != real_norm(k0) }
let w0: Real satisfy { real_norm(-w0) != real_norm(w0) }
function(x0: Real) { (-x0).abs = x0.abs }(w0)

goal: forall(x0: Real, x1: Real) { real_norm(x0 + x1) <= real_norm(x0) + real_norm(x1) }

p.c: exists(k0: Real, k1: Real) { not real_norm(k0 + k1) <= real_norm(k0) + real_norm(k1) }
let w0: Real satisfy { exists(k0: Real) { not real_norm(w0 + k0) <= real_norm(w0) + real_norm(k0) } }
let w1: Real satisfy { not real_norm(w0 + w1) <= real_norm(w0) + real_norm(w1) }
let w2: Real satisfy { not real_norm(w0 + w2) <= real_norm(w0) + real_norm(w2) }
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { real_norm(x0 + x1) <= real_norm(x0) + real_norm(x1) }(w0, w2)
function(x0: Real) { (if x0.is_negative { -x0 } else { x0 }) = x0.abs }(0)
not 0.is_negative or 0.abs = -0
0.abs = 0 or 0.is_negative

goal: forall(x0: Real, x1: Real) { (x0 * x1).norm = x0.norm * x1.norm }

p.c: exists(k0: Real, k1: Real) { (k0 * k1).norm != k0.norm * k1.norm }
let w0: Real satisfy { exists(k0: Real) { (w0 * k0).norm != w0.norm * k0.norm } }
let w1: Real satisfy { (w0 * w1).norm != w0.norm * w1.norm }
let w2: Real satisfy { (w0 * w2).norm != w0.norm * w2.norm }
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0.norm * x1.norm = (x0 * x1).norm }(w0, w2)
